## What's New in v0.2.0

- Feature: Automatic update checking every 2 hours with manual check option
- Feature: New changelog page at koryphaios.com/changelog
- Improvement: Enhanced update system with codeword verification
- Improvement: Better error handling for provider connections
- Fix: Fixed memory cleanup issues in long-running sessions

[View full changelog](https://koryphaios.com/changelog)
